item.name: REPO-SETUP — Setup: create shared registry for overlay Repository cases

item.name: REPO-CR-OK — CreateRepository durable-empty → Operation → durable, PRIVATE, tagCount=0 (A01)

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));

item.name: REPO-GET-NEG-ABSENT — GetRepository absent → 404 "repository not found" (existence-hiding, A08)

exec: pm.test('repository not found text', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql('repository not found'));

item.name: REPO-UPD-NEG-IMMUTABLE — UpdateRepository name in mask → 400 immutable text (A11)

exec: if (v !== undefined && v !== null) pm.environment.set('opId', String(v));
pm.test('name immutable text', () => pm.expect(pm.response.json().message).to.eql('name is immutable after Repository.Create'));

item.name: REPO-DEL-OK — DeleteRepository empty durable → Operation done → Get 404 (A13)

item.name: REPO-REN-OK — RenameRepository durable old→new → Get(new) 200, Get(old) 404 (A16)

item.name: REPO-CLEANUP — Cleanup: delete shared overlay registry

exec: const j=pm.response.json(); if (j && j.id) pm.environment.set('opId', String(j.id));
